_comment: Memory-benchmark budgets for the memperf harness (#8809). The harness compares MEASURED rows against these and exits non-zero when a hard budget is exceeded. A skipped (model-absent) row never fails a budget. Per-tier peakRssMb is the resident ceiling for a single-tier text load+run on desktop/server; ratchet down as the LRU fit-path + dynamic context selection land. coResidency.maxEvictions gates the REAL co-residency sequence on a known-fitting set; coResidency.selfCheckMinEvictions is the floor the synthetic wiring self-check must hit to prove the arbiter eviction telemetry counts (it can never satisfy the real gate).
